Frequently Asked Questions
1. AIIMS Common Recruitment Exam Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 13 June 2026.
2. AIIMS Common Recruitment Exam Exam Date?
The Aiims Examination will be Started in 25 to 27 July 2026
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the AIIMS Common Recruitment Exam Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the AIIMS Common Recruitment Exam Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. AIIMS Common Recruitment Exam Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. AIIMS Common Recruitment Exam Recruitment Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 03 July 2026..
6. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 03 July 2026 .
7. How can I apply for AIIMS Common Recruitment Exam Exam?
tables: AIIMS Common Recruitment Exam for AIIMS (CRE-5) Group B & C Various Post Application Status 2026

All India Institute of Medical Science AIIMS Has released the notification of Various Group B & C Post Recruitment Under Common Recruitment Exam for AIIMS (CRE-AIIMS) Exam 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this AIIMS Vacancy can apply online from 13 June 2026 to 03 July 2026 . Read the notification for AIIMS CRE  eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Details, age limit, pay scale and all other information.

Application Fees General / OBC : 3000 /- SC / ST / EWS : 2400 /- PH Candidate : 0/- Nil Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / Online Only.
AIIM Group B & C Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/07/2026 Minimum Age : Post wise. Maximum Age : Post wise. Age Relaxation as per AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026 Rules.

Candidate Can Apply Between 13 June 2026 to 03 July 2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in AIIMS Apply Online for Group B & C 2026. Kindly Check and College the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
